svg.title: IoTsmart ESP32-S3 overview
svg.desc: IoTsmart ESP32-S3 — SoM controller based on Espressif ESP32-S3
svg.text: SoM controller · Espressif ESP32-S3 · WiFi + BLE · plugs directly into IoTextra mezzanine modules
H-HOST or V-HOST connector · optional EYESPI (LCD) · Open Hardware · Open Source firmware
Part of the IoTsmart series · compatible with IoTextra mezzanine modules · Make Things Happy!
